title: Full Paths
description: Dirt Paths now take up a full block!
body:
# Full Paths
**Dirt Paths now take up a full block, rather than Minecraft's <sup>15</sup>⁄<sub>16</sub> of a block! Now you can properly utilize them in more versatile ways.**

# ✅ Features
- **Full Block** Dirt Paths, aligning perfectly with adjacent blocks.
- **No reverting to dirt** for Dirt Paths that are obstructed by non-full blocks, i.e. Decoration.
- **No more unsightly ledges**; the top line of adjacent blocks is no longer exposed.
